field_occurrences.description: Limits the number of series that get displayed. A joined subquery (or an extra phase where subqueries are not supported) is applied to limit the number of series that get fetched and rendered. This feature is useful when grouping by high cardinality column(s) though does increase the query complexity and cost.

notes: box_plot 使用独立的 BoxPlot 插件，不复用 Timeseries 的 Query section。它的核心结构是 `columns + groupby + metrics + boxplot post_processing`。
当前 controlPanel 的正式分布字段是 `columns`，显示标签被 override 成了 `Distribute across`，并带 `validateNonEmpty` 校验；buildQuery.ts 中仅在 `columns` 为空且 legacy 的 `granularity_sqla` 存在时，才会回退使用 `granularity_sqla`。
当前 controlPanel 的正式须线选项字段是 camelCase 的 `whiskerOptions`，不是 snake_case 的 `whisker_options`。后者只出现在老的 Cypress 用例中，不应作为新模板主字段。
当 `columns` 里选中了物理时间列且 `time_grain_sqla` 有值时，buildQuery.ts 会借助隐藏字段 `temporal_columns_lookup` 把该列包装成带 `timeGrain` 的 AdhocColumn，再送入 query.columns。

Chart Title 这组字段来自 `sections.chartTitle.tsx`。它们在 controlPanel 中的默认值是 `x_axis_title_margin=15`、`y_axis_title_margin=30`、`y_axis_title_position='Left'`；这与 `plugin-chart-echarts/src/constants.ts` 里的 `DEFAULT_TITLE_FORM_DATA` 不同。
buildQuery.ts 会把最终 query.columns 组织成 `columns + groupby`，并把 `groupby` 额外复制到 `series_columns`。boxplotOperator 再依据 `whiskerOptions` 输出 `whisker_type/percentiles/groupby/metrics` 的 post_processing。

groupby.label: Dimensions
groupby.description: Categories to group by on the x-axis.

columns.label: Distribute across
columns.initialValue: 当 datasource 存在且当前值为空时，默认回填 getTemporalColumns(state.datasource).defaultTemporalColumn

form_data_overrides.groupby: 从 getStandardizedControls().controls.columns 中减去 formData.columns 后得到，并从 standardized controls.columns 中剔除这些 groupby 项

Query.default_value: 动态：若 datasource 存在且当前值为空，则回填 datasource 的默认时间列

Query.description: Limits the number of series that get displayed. A joined subquery (or an extra phase where subqueries are not supported) is applied to limit the number of series that get fetched and rendered. This feature is useful when grouping by high cardinality column(s) though does increase the query complexity and cost.

Orders the query result that generates the source data for this chart. If a series or row limit is reached, this determines what data are truncated. If undefined, defaults to the first metric (where appropriate).
Limits the number of the rows that are computed in the query that is the source of the data used for this chart.
Determines how whiskers and outliers are calculated.
